de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Interface ProofOblInput

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    ContractPO, InfFlowCompositePO, InfFlowLeavePO, InfFlowPO, IPersistablePO
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractInfFlowPO, AbstractOperationPO, AbstractPO, BlockExecutionPO, DependencyContractPO, FunctionalOperationContractPO, InfFlowContractPO, KeYUserProblemFile, LoopInvExecutionPO, ProgramMethodPO, ProgramMethodSubsetPO, ProofStarter.UserProvidedInput, SymbolicExecutionPO, TacletProofObligationInput, WellDefinednessPO

    public interface ProofOblInput
    Represents something that produces an input proof obligation for the prover. A .key file or a proof obligation generated from a CASE tool may be instances.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      KeYJavaType getContainerType()
      Returns the KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in.
      ProofAggregate getPO()
      Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input.
      boolean implies(ProofOblInput po)
      If true, then this PO implies the passed one.
      String name()
      Returns the name of the proof obligation input.
      void readProblem() 

    • Method Detail

      • name

        String name()
        Returns the name of the proof obligation input.

      • readProblem

        void readProblem()
          throws ProofInputException
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • getPO

        ProofAggregate getPO()
              throws ProofInputException
        Returns the proof obligation term as result of the proof obligation input. If there is still no input available because nothing has been read yet null is returned.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • implies

        boolean implies(ProofOblInput po)
        If true, then this PO implies the passed one.

      • getContainerType

        KeYJavaType getContainerType()
        Returns the KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in.
        Returns:
        The KeYJavaType in which the proven element is contained in or null if not available.
